name: Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the first set of ingredients (milk, eggs, parsley, flour, salt, pepper, baking powder, Worcestershire sauce, and nutmeg) in a blender in the order listed.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Add the peeled and cut potatoes (into 1-inch cubes).
4. Blend until finely chopped but not pureed. Stop periodically to clean the sides of the blender with a spatula.
5. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in an electric skillet to 350°F (175°C).
6. Pour batter into the hot oil, making pancakes about 1 tablespoon per pancake.
7. Spread out and cook for about 2 minutes on each side.
8. Transfer cooked pancakes to a platter in a warm oven while cooking the rest.
